hyperedges.label: PTD-P Parallelism Composition: Tensor Parallelism (intra-node NVLink), Pipeline Parallelism (inter-node), Data Parallelism / ZeRO (across all) compose to enable trillion-parameter training
FSDP Training Flow: AllGather params on forward, ReduceScatter grads on backward, implementing ZeRO-3 gather-just-in-time pattern via NCCL
Inference Optimization Stack: KV cache sizing (Transformer Math formula), quantization, FlashAttention, and speculative decoding together determine serving feasibility on a given GPU
